entry.title: Re: Concern about "Inscriptions"
entry.summary: The exploration into blockchain technology has highlighted that storage is not the primary concern in blockchain operations as previously thought. Instead, the significant challenge lies in the "initial blockchain sync" time. This phase is crucial as it involves verifying the blockchain trustlessly, which currently demands considerable storage resources. UTreeXO has been identified as a potentially effective solution for enhancing the efficiency of this process. It proposes a method whereby the entire chain does not need to be downloaded, yet it can still be verified in a trustless manner. This development could represent a pivotal advancement in reducing the time and resources required for blockchain synchronization.
